description: Develop a Talon Voice package for logging fingerprint minutiae in `C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\fingerprint_logger\`. The package must include a Python module `minutiae_logger.py` defining a custom action `user.log_minutiae(feature: str)` that appends the current mouse coordinates, a timestamp, and the feature name to `C:\Evidence\latent_report.csv` (with the header `Timestamp,X,Y,Feature`). Map the spoken commands 'tag bifurcation', 'tag ridge ending', 'tag enclosure', 'tag short ridge', 'tag delta', and 'tag core' in `minutiae_logger.talon` to the `user.log_minutiae` action using their corresponding feature labels.
